title: Simulation Step (Simplified Input)
description: A user-friendly form to describe a single simulation step (computational analysis, numerical model run, or data-driven calculation). Provide a name, the datasets or materials going in, the results coming out, and any quantitative simulation parameters. This input will be automatically converted to a standardised RDF representation (OBI/PMDCo OO-LD).

step_name.title: Step Name
step_name.description: A human-readable name for this simulation step. Example: 'FEM stress analysis run 1', 'Constitutive model calibration batch A'.

step_id.title: Step ID
step_id.description: Optional. Identifier (IRI slug) for this step in the RDF graph. Auto-derived from step_name if omitted.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional free-text description of this simulation step.

inputs.title: Input Dataset / Material IRIs
inputs.description: IRIs of datasets or material nodes consumed by this simulation. Reference existing knowledge-graph nodes.

outputs.title: Output Dataset / Result IRIs
outputs.description: IRIs of datasets or result nodes produced by this simulation. Reference existing knowledge-graph nodes.

preceded_by.title: Preceded By (Step IRIs)
preceded_by.description: IRIs of steps that directly precede this one in the workflow.

conditions.title: Simulation Parameters
conditions.description: Quantitative parameters governing this simulation step (e.g. mesh size, time step, convergence tolerance).
